Kadavanthra, Edappally, Mattancherry, Thripunithura

About the Best Eye Care Hospital in Kochi

Giridhar Eye Institute (GEI), located in Kadavanthara, Cochin, is an NABH-accredited hospital established on September 8, 1997, offering comprehensive eye care services. As the first eye hospital in Kerala to receive ISO 9001:2008 certification, GEI prioritizes patient satisfaction through personalized, affordable care. The institute also holds Safe-I Hospital Certification from the National Rural Health Mission. With skilled professionals and advanced equipment, GEI fosters an integrated environment dedicated to maintaining high standards of excellence.

A Journey of Growth and Community Care

From a modest 2,000 square feet, Giridhar Eye Institute (GEI) has expanded to become one of the largest referral centers for retinal, ocular trauma, cataract, and glaucoma treatments. Serving over 100,000 patients annually, GEI performs more than 4,000 surgeries each year across five fully equipped operation theaters. Committed to community health, the institute conducts over 400 free surgeries and treats 8,000 patients through free camps, ensuring better eye health for all.

Core Values:  Mission, Vision, Quality Commitment

Share your wedding moments with your guests

Mission

Establish an eye care centre with all sub-specialties in Ophthalmology. Provide clinical expertise comparable to the best in the world. Establish it as a centre where clinical practice is combined with teaching and research.

Vision

Affordable Quality Eye Care for All.

Quality Policy

We are totally committed to take care of patients’ requirements by offering expert ophthalmic care with a team of trained, committed and dedicated professionals and continually improve the quality of our services to ensure excellent medical care and patient satisfaction.
